contents:
(* Add Ring N : (rings.stdlib_semiring_theory N). *)

(* NatDistance instances are all equivalent, because their behavior is fully
 determined by the specification. *)

Lemma nat_distance_unique {a b : NatDistance N}
  : forall x y, @nat_distance _ _ a x y = @nat_distance _ _ b x y.

goals.conclusion: forall x y : N, nat_distance x y = nat_distance x y
forall x y : N, nat_distance x y = nat_distance x y
nat_distance x y = nat_distance x y

match nat_distance_sig x y with
| inl s => s.1
| inr s => s.1
end = match nat_distance_sig x y with
      | inl s => s.1
      | inr s => s.1
      end

contents:
destruct (@nat_distance_sig _ _ a x y) as [[z1 E1]|[z1 E1]],
(@nat_distance_sig _ _ b x y) as [[z2 E2]|[z2 E2]];simpl.

(* An existing instance of [CutMinus]
   allows to create an instance of [NatDistance] *)

Instance natdistance_cut_minus `{Naturals N} `{!TrivialApart N}
   {cm} `{!CutMinusSpec N cm} `{forall x y, Decidable (x ≤ y)} : NatDistance N.

hypotheses.type: forall x y : N, Decidable (x ≤ y)
forall x y : N, Decidable (x ≤ y)

goals.conclusion: forall x y : N, {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

hypotheses.type: forall x y : N, Decidable (x ≤ y)

goals.conclusion: {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : N, Decidable (x0 ≤ y0)

goals.conclusion: {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : N, Decidable (x0 ≤ y0)

goals.conclusion: {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : N, Decidable (x0 ≤ y0)

goals.conclusion: {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : N, Decidable (x0 ≤ y0)
forall x0 y0 : N, Decidable (x0 ≤ y0)
forall x0 y0 : N, Decidable (x0 ≤ y0)

goals.conclusion: {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : N, Decidable (x0 ≤ y0)
forall x0 y0 : N, Decidable (x0 ≤ y0)
forall x0 y0 : N, Decidable (x0 ≤ y0)

contents:
(* Using the preceding instance we can make an instance
   for arbitrary models of the naturals
   by translation into [nat] on which we already have a [CutMinus] instance. *)

goals.conclusion: {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

contents:
destruct (nat_distance_sig (naturals_to_semiring N nat x)
  (naturals_to_semiring N nat y)) as [[n E]|[n E]].

goals.conclusion: {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat x + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat y

goals.conclusion: {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat y + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat x

goals.conclusion: {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat x + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat y
naturals_to_semiring N nat x + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat y

goals.conclusion: x + naturals_to_semiring nat N n = y

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat x + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat y

goals.conclusion:
x + naturals_to_semiring nat N n =
naturals_to_semiring nat N (naturals_to_semiring N nat x + n)

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat x + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat y

goals.conclusion: x + naturals_to_semiring nat N n = x + naturals_to_semiring nat N n

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat x + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat y

goals.conclusion: {z : N & x + z = y} + {z : N & y + z = x}

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat y + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat x
naturals_to_semiring N nat y + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat x

goals.conclusion: y + naturals_to_semiring nat N n = x

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat y + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat x

goals.conclusion:
y + naturals_to_semiring nat N n =
naturals_to_semiring nat N (naturals_to_semiring N nat y + n)

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat y + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat x

goals.conclusion: y + naturals_to_semiring nat N n = y + naturals_to_semiring nat N n

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat y + n = naturals_to_semiring N nat x
